title: Dark Harlem Black Knight Heavy Box Shirt
description:
Dark Harlem Black Knight Heavy Box Shirt

The shadowed counterpart to the White Knight — featuring the new Swarovski® crystal DHK emblem handcrafted onto luxury heavyweight cotton. Bold, sharp, and iconic to the DHK collection.

Every piece arrives with a premium silk logo bag — because presentation is power.

Details:

  • • Sizes: S–3XL
  • • Weight: 330 gsm
  • • Material: 100% cotton
  • • Logo: DHK emblem made with Swarovski® crystals
  • • Rhinestone Color: AB crystals
  • • Color: Black
  • • Includes premium silk logo bag

title: The Dark Harlem Black Knight Hoodie
description:
The Dark Harlem Black Knight Hoodie

The signature cornerstone of the DHK collection — crafted in ultra-premium heavyweight cotton and finished with the Swarovski® crystal DHK emblem. Built with a structured silhouette, elevated drape, and signature dark-luxury identity.

Designed to carry the full Dark Harlem Knight presence.

Details:

  • • Sizes: S–3XL
  • • Weight: 600 gsm
  • • Material: 100% cotton
  • • Logo: DHK emblem made with Swarovski® crystals
  • • Swarovski® Crystal Color: AB crystal
  • • Color: Black
  • • No draw cords
  • • Drop shoulder fit
  • • Bio polished finish
  • • Inner side raised lining
  • • Kangaroo pocket
